arts.ttl: Bayern’s midfield talent in doubt for Inter clash amid mononucleosis battle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlovic has been sidelined indefinitely after being diagnosed with mononucleosis, casting...

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern to stay risk-averse with Pavlovic
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany and Co. will take their time with an ailing Aleksandar Pavlovic ahead of the season run-in.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich chose to stay at Bayern Munich because it gave him best chance for “maximum success”
arts.sum: After a lot of speculation about an exit, Joshua Kimmich opted to ink a contract extension with Bayern Munich . Joshua Kimmich will be with Bayern Munich through the 2028/29 season...

arts.ttl: Report: João Palhinha “candidate for sale” at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Following Kimmich’s imminent extension, there would be an oversupply in midfield next season (Kimmich, Goretzka, Pavlović, Bischof, Palhinha). With Kimmich reportedly agreed to re-up and Leon Goretzka re-establishing his value — and in any case looking set to run down his contract if he is not extended also — Palhinha is simply the odd man out.

arts.ttl: Klinsmann: Inter-Bayern ‘could have been the final’, but ‘it’s time for Inter to win’
